intentSynonyms: copy a file to a new location in powerpoint
description: Create a copy of a file in OneDrive. Optionally specify a new name and destination folder. The copy operation runs asynchronously.

item_id.description: Item ID of the file to copy

name.description: Name for the copy (defaults to "original name (copy)")

destination_folder_id.description: Destination folder item ID — defaults to same folder
